name: Performapal Gentrude
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジェントルード
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If "Performapal Ladyange" is in your other Pendulum Zone and you control no monsters, or only Pendulum Monsters: You can add 1 "Odd-Eyes" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Gentrude" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is destroyed: You can place 1 "Performapal" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone, except "Performapal Gentrude". If this card is face-up in your Extra Deck: You can discard 1 Pendulum Monster; add this card to your hand, then you can return 1 "Performapal" or "Odd-Eyes" card from your Pendulum Zone to the hand. You can only use 1 "Performapal Gentrude" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
pend_eff: If "Performapal Ladyange" is in your other Pendulum Zone and you control no monsters, or only Pendulum Monsters: You can add 1 "Odd-Eyes" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Gentrude" once per turn.

If this card is face-up in your Extra Deck: You can discard 1 Pendulum Monster; add this card to your hand, then you can return 1 "Performapal" or "Odd-Eyes" card from your Pendulum Zone to the hand. You can only use 1 "Performapal Gentrude" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If this card is destroyed: You can place 1 "Performapal" Pendulum Monster from your Deck in your Pendulum Zone, except "Performapal Gentrude". If this card is face-up in your Extra Deck: You can discard 1 Pendulum Monster; add this card to your hand, then you can return 1 "Performapal" or "Odd-Eyes" card from your Pendulum Zone to the hand. You can only use 1 "Performapal Gentrude" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Activates if other Pendulum Zone is occupied by specific card
Activates if destroyed by card effect
Places from Deck to Pendulum Zone
Returns itself from Extra Deck to hand
Returns from your field to your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
